text:
is the 1st segment of the 6th episode and the 14th segment overall of the Chibi Theater: Fly, Cadets, Fly! anime, produced by and .

Overview

 Sasha and Conny try getting even with the commandant. 

Summary

Commandant Keith catches Sasha and Conny slacking off during training which results in punishment for both by being denied supper. Sasha laments that she has to skip supper again, prompting Conny to say that food is all that she cares about.

The two talk about how they are the only ones who get in trouble while other cadets also slack off and never do. Believing that the commandant has it out for them, they begin scheming to teach him a lesson. In the classroom, Sasha stands on Conny's back to place a chalkboard eraser at the top of the entrance door. However, Eren arrives first and it falls on his head instead. During an endurance training, Sasha had prepared a trap in the forest beforehand for the commandant, but Eren is again caught in it.

Later on, as Sasha and Conny are digging up holes in the drill grounds, they are approached by Eren, Mikasa, and Armin, who each falls in a covered up hole. Conny accidentally falls in another hole followed by Sasha when she tries to run away. A Titan suddenly appears and eats them all. Inside its stomach, Conny questions Eren for always getting in the way of his plans, and Sasha says that it does not matter anymore.
